next_steps: Perform urinalysis and microscopy (check for myoglobinuria)
Initiate broad-spectrum empiric antibiotics including coverage for atypical organisms (e.g., fluoroquinolones)
Perform urgent lumbar puncture to evaluate for central nervous system infection
Consult nephrology for emergent hemodialysis assessment
Order autoimmune panel including myositis-specific antibodies and ANA
Inquire about exposure to water sources, flooding, or rodent droppings
